memberdef.name: SynthType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "wfmgen.Synth", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(SynthObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)Synth_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Synth type.\n", .tp_methods = Synth_methods, .tp_new = Synth_new, .tp_init = (initproc)Synth_init, }
